summary: Fantastic show with a soaring second set (Playing in the Band → Wharf Rat → Goin’ Down the Road Feeling Bad → Playing in the Band) and standout Donna vocals, but no recording details provided.
review: The reviewer raves about the performance, especially the high‑energy second set that launches with a superb sequence of Playing in the Band into Wharf Rat, Goin’ Down the Road Feeling Bad, and back into Playing in the Band. Donna Jean’s soulful voice and an unexpectedly great Around & Around are also highlighted. No comments were made about the source or fidelity of the recording.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 4‑star review praises the musical performance strongly; lack of any recording commentary limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or other technical aspects were provided.

standout_songs: Goin' Down the Road Feeling Bad
show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is described as a liftoff, with a seamless, high‑energy sequence that drives the show forward.
